info.title: ScoreCard AI API
info.description: Provides an API for logging testcases and running testsets against a model.

post.description:
Two types of prompts can be created - a root prompt or a child prompt (aka Prompt Version in app).

        A root prompt can be created by providing the `name` param, and it will always be tagged as prod.
         
        A child prompt can be created by providing the `parent_id` param. Note that the `name` param in this case will be ignored as all descendents from a root prompt would share the root's name. `is_prod` can also be provided to configure whether a child should be tagged as prod.

schema.title: Prompt Params
schema.description: The parameters to create a new prompt.

value.name: Prompt Name
value.prompt_template:
<system>
You are a helpful assistant. Use the provided context to answer the user's query.

Context: {context}
</system>

<user>
{user_query}
</user>

example_child.summary: Create a child prompt (aka Prompt Version)

value.prompt_template:
<system>
You are a helpful assistant. Use the provided context to answer the user's query.

Context: {context}
</system>

<user>
{user_query}
</user>

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The id of the prompt to get.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: The id of the prompt to get.

Update a prompt.

        `is_prod` tags the provided prompt as the production prompt within the prompt graph.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The ID of the run that created the grade.

testcase_id.title: Testcase Id
testcase_id.description: The ID of the testcase associated with the grade.

testrecord_id.title: Testrecord Id
testrecord_id.description: The ID of the testrecord for which the grade was created.

metric_id.title: Metric Id
metric_id.description: The ID of the metric used to compute the grade.

binary_score.title: Binary Score
binary_score.description: The binary score assigned to the grade.

int_score.title: Int Score
int_score.description: The integer score assigned to the grade.

reasoning.title: Reasoning
reasoning.description: The reasoning for the assigned score.
examples: The moon is not made of cheese so this result is not factual.

human_eval.title: Human Eval
human_eval.description: Indicates if a human should assign a grade.

error_message.title: Error Message
error_message.description: The error message if the grade was not created successfully.
examples: An error occurred while creating the grade.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: when the grade was last updated.

value.title: JSON Object Value
value.description: The value of the JSON object, which can be a dictionary, list, string, integer, float, boolean, or None.

nestedListExample: This is a string inside a nested list
dictExample.nestedStringExample: This is a string inside a nested dictionary

listExample: This is a string inside a list

listExample.nestedDictExample: This is a nested dictionary inside a list
